description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a wooden fence and featuring a spacious, grassy backyard with a large central tree. The property includes a driveway with a covered carport, a small garden area, and a patio with outdoor seating. The main building is constructed from light-colored masonry with several windows and doors providing access to the interior. The backyard also contains a rectangular swimming pool and a separate outbuilding, possibly a shed or pool house. The front yard is paved, and the overall layout is open and modern, with clear divisions between living, recreational, and utility spaces. The architectural style is simple and functional, emphasizing outdoor living and privacy.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, fenced yard, carport, pool, and spacious garden featuring a large tree. The design is open and functional, with distinct living and outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, paved driveway, main entrance, and a glimpse of the backyard with a large tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fenced backyard, swimming pool, garden, and the outbuilding at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the pool, patio area, and the central tree in the garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, side fence, and the open grassy area with the pool and tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
